evidence.claim: Used Go, Kubeflow, OpenSearch, Elasticsearch, Sentence Transformers, Milvus, Vector Search, Weaviate, FAISS, and GANs in production environments.
evidence.source_text: Skills: Go (intermediate, 28mo, 5 endorsements); Kubeflow (intermediate, 28mo, 7 endorsements); OpenSearch (expert, 48mo, 32 endorsements); Elasticsearch (expert, 92mo, 11 endorsements); Sentence Transformers (expert, 93mo, 4 endorsements); Milvus (advanced, 57mo, 38 endorsements); Vector Search (expert, 50mo, 32 endorsements); Weaviate (expert, 73mo, 11 endorsements); FAISS (advanced, 37mo, 60 endorsements); GANs (intermediate, 30mo, 11 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature stores.
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Shipped first RAG-based feature and owns the evaluation framework.
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% through a learning-to-rank model.
Developed a churn prediction model used by the customer success team for outreach prioritization.
evidence.source_text: My main project was a churn prediction model that's now used by the customer success team to prioritize outreach.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project.
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Learns primarily through shipping real systems and observing production performance.
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes infrastructure and data quality over modeling in production environments.
evidence.source_text: Most of the work was infrastructure and data quality — the modeling part was almost the easy bit.

evidence.claim: Experienced in debugging production ranking issues and identifying relevant signals.
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.
